_schema: Datastore — a shared backend store (database, blob, event bus) that anchors data_model entities

_fields.name: Human-readable name (e.g. 'Primary Postgres')
_fields.kind: Backend kind: postgres | mysql | sqlite | mongo | redis | blob_storage | event_bus | other
repos: Repo names that share this datastore
tables: Populated by scan_database (Slice 2). Each: {schema, name, columns, fk_count, rows_estimate}
_fields.last_scanned_at: ISO timestamp of last successful schema scan
_fields.source_repo: Repository name this record was authored from

_note: Auto-seeded as 'datastore:primary' when DATABASE_URL is set in engine.env. DELETE this schema entry once a real datastore exists. See plans/DATASTORE_AS_HUB.md.
